name: debug-hunter
description: FinTech AI closed-loop debugging & financial-security detection workflow for Java/Spring settlement systems.

interface.longDescription: Debug Hunter guides the agent through a 7-stage closed loop (threat-model, detect, triage, reproduce with attack PoC, fix, verify against financial invariants, guard + recycle) to hunt financial correctness and security/fraud vulnerabilities in Java/Spring settlement systems. It pairs a curated knowledge base with Semgrep/CodeQL rules and runnable JDK demos.
defaultPrompt: Threat-model the money flows in src/settlement and list attack hypotheses
Scan src/settlement for financial correctness and security bugs with evidence
Reproduce this settlement bug as a failing test, then propose a fix
